---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] Brief description of the requested feature"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Feature Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem/Use Case
What problem does this feature solve? What use case would it address?

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you think this feature should work. Include:
- User interface changes (if any)
- New functionality details
- How it integrates with existing features

## Alternative Solutions
Have you considered any alternative approaches or workarounds?

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or examples that help explain the feature request.

## Implementation Notes
If you have technical suggestions:
- Which tool(s) would this affect?
- Any technical constraints or considerations?
- Similar features in other tools that could be referenced

## Checklist
- [ ] This feature would benefit other users
- [ ] I've checked that this hasn't been requested before
- [ ] I understand this is a volunteer-maintained project
